title: Scrolls N Scripting
description: A minecraft mod that adds a scripting table that allows enchantment copying  and scrolls that can be bound to potion effects for multiple uses.
body:
With this mod you can craft a new block called a scripting table. The scripting table allows you to input enchanted items or books, along with an empty book and an xp bottle, and enscribe the input items enchantments onto a new enchanted book. You can also input potions, along with an empty scroll (new) and an xp bottle, and bind the potion effect to the scroll for up to 10 uses of that potion (via the bound scroll). Scrolls have a 1 minute cooldown between each use.

This is an early release so, although I have done thorough testing, there could still be some bugs. I may eventually add some more features and configuration, and will consider requests through the comments.

Enjoy!
